zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick於1580年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾可洛本時，他的父親Thomas Kirkpatrick25歲，母親Kirkpatrick21歲。他於1599年5月30日與Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾吉可馬結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1645年在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick于1580年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾可洛本时，他的父亲Thomas Kirkpatrick25岁，母亲Kirkpatrick21岁。他于1599年5月30日与Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield在英国苏格兰度福利爾吉可馬结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1645年在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick was born in 1580, in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Kirkpatrick, was 25 and his mother, Kirkpatrick, was 21. He married Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield on 30 May 1599, in Kirkmahoe, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died about 1645, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick est né en 1580, à Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Kirkpatrick, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Kirkpatrick, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield le 30 mai 1599, à Kirkmahoe, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé environ 1645, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrickが1580年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアクロセブルンで生まれた時，父Thomas Kirkpatrickは25歳，母Kirkpatrickは21歳であった。1599年5月30日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルクマーhオでDame Agnes Charteris of Amisfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は約1645年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで66歳で死去した。

ko.Closeburn, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 클로세번
ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick(이)가 1580년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 클로세번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kirkpatrick(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Kirkpatrick(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1599년 5월 30일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 커크마호에서 Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1645년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield em 30 de maio de 1599, em Kirkmahoe, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.Closeburn, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: клосебурн, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick родился в 1580 г. в местности клосебурн, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Kirkpatrick было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Kirkpatrick, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield 30 мая 1599 г. в местности киркмахо, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер около 1645 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
